name: Bass with Avocado Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the first five ingredients and process until smooth. Set aside.
2. Combine lemon juice and next three ingredients in a shallow dish. Dip fillets in lemon juice mixture, then dredge in bread crumbs.
3. Place coated fillets on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray. Bake at 450°F for 7 minutes.
4. Turn fillets over and bake an additional 7 minutes or until fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
5. Transfer fillets to a serving platter and top with avocado sauce.
